name: West African Resources Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.2400, stop A$2.6532, target A$3.7100 (0.80:1) — then trail it.
